channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Linux pulls support for ancient CPU — unsurprisingly, Linus Torvald says there is 'zero real reason' to keep a 37-year-old Intel 486 CPU going
item.description: Linux kernel drops support for Intel 486 CPUs, prioritizing modern architectures, while retro users can still run old software and Linux apps.

item.title: Kits solaires de balcon : quels sont les vrais bénéfices ?
item.description: Le fabricant Anker SOLIX vient de publier un livre blanc sur l’efficacité des kits solaires de balcon, baptisé « From Balcony Power Plant to Energy System ». Basé sur les données réelles d’utilisation d’un échantillon aléatoire de 230 000 foyers allemands en 2025, ce rapport dévoile l’impact concret des batteries sur les factures d’électricité : l’autoconsommation progresse nettement, mais la rentabilité financière mérite une analyse nuancée....

item.title: Demons and pinball are a perfect match
item.description: There's one very specific reason I keep a Wii U handy, and that's so that I have an easy way to play the classic pinball game Devil's Crush. Over the years, it has become a comfort game for me. I'm not entirely sure what it is, but there's something about the combination of familiar pinball […]

item.title: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
item.description: In the early days of the war on Iran, while the White House was busy posting Call of Duty memes and AI slop of dancing bowling pins, the Iranian regime's state media was flooding the zone with video after video of what was happening on the ground: Explosions over Tehran. Smoke billowing in the sky. […]

item.title: Keanu Reeves' new Apple TV movie Outcome has been slammed by critics — watch these 4 highly-rated films with the beloved actor instead
item.description: Critics say Apple's new movie starring Keanu Reeves isn't worth your time — so I recommend watching this quartet instead.

item.title: ‘Crimson Desert’ Is a Cat Dad Simulator
item.description: Step into the shoes of the strongest, goodest boy in a game that is beautiful, baffling, and impossible to put down.

item.title: Zuvi ColorBox Review: A Hair Dye Printer That Struggles
item.description: This hair dye printer promises hundreds of shades. It couldn't even manage two.

item.title: On a testé l’UTO PRO16 : un excellent vélo pliant électrique, aussi design que performant
item.description: Brillant sur le design, le pliage, l’agrément et l’assistance, l’UTO PRO16 n’est pas encore parfait à cause de sa connectivité perfectible ou du poids élevé, mais il reste un solide vélo électrique pliant 16 pouces.

item.title: This Loud-Ass Party Speaker Almost Got Me High AF
item.description: I thought the Soundboks Mix was going to make mortal enemies, but I actually made some, um, special friends.

item.title: VHS-Inspired ‘Cyberpunk 2077’ Mod Takes Night City Back to the Future
item.description: Sometimes looking less realistic can mean feeling more realistic.

item.title: The new show making fun of tech bros
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 123, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, which Artemis photo did you make your wallpaper, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Sam Altman and Satoshi Nakamoto […]

item.title: ‘I hadn’t verified a single thing’: Using ChatGPT for Iran war news changed how I trust information
item.description: AI search has improved dramatically in the past year, but as it gets smoother and more reliable, we may be getting worse at questioning it.

item.title: 'AI is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity': Amazon CEO Andy Jassy lays out his '6 truths' for the future of AI
item.description: When it comes to AI at Amazon, the future is unsurprisingly bright, CEO Andy Jassy declares.

item.title: How to watch Grand National 2026: Free Streams & TV Channels for Aintree National Hunt Race
item.description: All the ways to watch Grand National 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with I Am Maximus lining up as the Aintree steeplechase favorite.

item.title: X's messaging app, XChat, may be available soon
item.description: XChat is now on the App Store, where its listing says that it’s expected to be available for download on April 17. This isn’t the same IRC app from the early aughts, which you may remember if you’re of a certain age. This is a messaging app specifically for X users. X chief Elon Musk first talked about rolling out a new version of his social network’s direct messaging feature in mid-2025. In a series of posts back then, he said the new version would be encrypted and would feature a “whole new architecture.” He also said all X users were getting XChat in June last year, but Musk is pretty infam...

item.title: Pourquoi choisir le nouveau modèle quand le Samsung Galaxy S25 est bradé à moins de 600 € chez Boulanger ?
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S25 reste une valeur sûre en 2026. Ce smartphone noté 8/10 est toujours recommandable, d'autant plus maintenant qu'il se trouve dans un pack à moins de 600 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: MacBook Neo vs. MacBook Air: Which One Should You Buy?
item.description: After conducting long-term testing on both the MacBook Neo and MacBook Air, I have a good idea who should buy which laptop.

item.title: Save $200 and get the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra at its preorder price for a limited time at Amazon
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is the best Android phone you can buy right now. It's currently $200 off for a limited time only. Here's why you need it.
